enrichment.readme_excerpt: # DESIGN.md A format specification for describing a visual identity to coding agents. DESIGN.md gives agents a persistent, structured understanding of a design system. ## The Format A DESIGN.md file combines machine-readable design tokens (YAML front matter) with human-readable design rationale (markdown prose). Tokens give agents exact values. Prose tells them *why* those values exist and how to apply them. ```md --- name: Heritage colors: primary: "#1A1C1E" secondary: "#6C7278" tertiary: "#B84
